sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29753" key="dwdeka/tropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκά-τροπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n29753.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fixed circle of twelve divisions</tr_> through which the zodiac is supposed to revolve, Vett.
